title: What movies do you think the characters would watch
display_title: What movies do you think the characters would watch
wikitext:
[]: What movies do you think the characters would watch?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon Apr 13, 2009 8:15 pm I got the idea from the music thread and the topic said it all. What movies do you think the main characters would watch?

[]:             Quote Post by MassiveInvader » Mon Nov 26, 2012 9:08 am Maybe The Big Chill?

[]:             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Mon Nov 26, 2012 12:38 pm Since Shinji was watching a "Second Impact" movie in the theater in episode 4, maybe he's a disaster buff. Films like Earthquake, The Towering Inferno, and The Poseidon Adventure may rank high in his list.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Mon Nov 26, 2012 12:44 pm Porn, all of them.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 26, 2012 12:51 pm The Oogieloves in the Big Balloon Adventure

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Mon Nov 26, 2012 1:47 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The Oogieloves in the Big Balloon Adventure

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Mon Nov 26, 2012 4:02 pm Kaji: Full Metal Jacket Rei: 2001, a space odyssey.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 26, 2012 8:07 pm Dream wrote: Rei: 2001, a space odyssey.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Nov 26, 2012 8:33 pm Asuka'd probably watch action movies, maybe character drama's.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon Nov 26, 2012 9:14 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Mon Nov 26, 2012 9:41 pm Asuka- Top Gun. Misato- Anything with a drinking game.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Nov 26, 2012 10:37 pm Shinji: Disaster movies, as noted above. Asuka: Soaps, believe it or not. We see her watching a few during the descent arc. No direct evidence for the others as best I can recall. The question's a bit simplistic, though, since they all presumably like all sorts of movies (or at least like more than one genre).

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Mon Nov 26, 2012 10:41 pm Misato:Beerfest

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Mon Nov 26, 2012 11:48 pm The whole cast: The Cabin In The Woods.

[]:             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Tue Nov 27, 2012 1:09 am Kaworu; Another Earth. Man that movie creeped me out.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Tue Nov 27, 2012 1:19 am Shinji: Speak . Asuka and Mari: Band of Brothers. Kaworu: Brokeback Mountain .

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Nov 27, 2012 3:45 am Bagheera wrote: Asuka: Soaps, believe it or not. We see her watching a few during the descent arc.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 27, 2012 1:05 pm Episode 16 -- with a line of dialogue about guys who are bad kissers never working out.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Tue Nov 27, 2012 1:44 pm Sgt. Griff wrote: Kaworu; Another Earth. Man that movie creeped me out.

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Wed Nov 28, 2012 4:15 am This got wordy, so I put explanations in spoilers for those interested. Shinji- Disaster. SPOILER: Show
